'''Team Purella''' was one of the five [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] strike-teams sent to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] as part of [[Operation Roundabout]]. Consisting of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]], the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] Jedi [[Thann Mithric]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Kolir Hu'lya]], their mission was to arrest [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Aidel Saxan]].

The Corellians had anticipated the strike, however, and the Prime Minister's motorcade was actually an ambush packed with [[YVH 1]] battle droids. Team Purella was able to withdraw from the trap, however, and joined up with [[Tahiri Veila]]'s [[Team Tauntaun]] to improvise an escape by "borrowing" [[Gara Petothel|Kirney Slane]] and [[Kolot]]'s shuttle from [[Donoslane Excursions]] at [[Behareh Spaceport]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
